title: A Fun School Day
story_html: Today is a school day. At recess, I play tag on the playground. My sibling plays with me. We laugh and run. At noon, we eat lunch in the cafeteria. After school, we visit grandma. She has a pet parrot. It says hello to us. Today is special. We celebrate her birthday. She cooks peppers for dinner. She keeps drinks cold in the refrigerator. After dinner, we watch a video. The video shows a tiger. It has orange and black fur.

tiger.def: A large wild cat with orange fur and black stripes.

grandma.def: The mother of your mom or dad.

peppers.def: Vegetables that can taste sweet or spicy.

recess.def: A short break between lessons at school.

playground.def: An outdoor area at school where children play.

parrot.def: A colorful bird that can copy sounds and words.

special.def: Different from usual, in a good way.

celebrate.def: To do something special and happy for an important day.

refrigerator.def: A machine that keeps food cold.

questions.qtext: "At recess, I play tag on the playground." What does recess mean?
questions.explain: Recess is a short break between lessons at school.

questions.qtext: "She keeps drinks cold in the refrigerator." What does refrigerator mean?
options: a machine that keeps food cold
questions.explain: A refrigerator is a machine that keeps food and drinks cold.

questions.qtext: Who does the narrator play with at recess?
questions.explain: The story says, "My sibling plays with me" at recess.
Grandma has a pet parrot that says hello.

questions.qtext: What do they watch after dinner?
questions.explain: After dinner, they watch a video that shows a tiger.
